Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client of the barbershop, storing their personal details and contact information for CRM and booking purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Client entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the client.

lastName.description: The last name of the client.

email.description: The email address of the client.

phone.description: The phone number of the client.

notes.description: Internal notes about the client, e.g., preferences, for CRM purposes.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the client record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the client record was last updated.

Barber.title: Barber
Barber.description: Represents a barber working at the barbershop, including their profile, specialty, and availability for appointments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Barber entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the barber.

lastName.description: The last name of the barber.

email.description: The email address of the barber.

phone.description: The phone number of the barber.

bio.description: A short biographical description of the barber, highlighting their style or experience.

specialties.description: A list of services or styles the barber specializes in.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the barber's profile picture.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the barber record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the barber record was last updated.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Defines a specific service offered by the barbershop, including its name, description, pricing, and duration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., 'Men's Haircut', 'Beard Trim').

description.description: A detailed description of what the service entails.

price.description: The monetary cost of the service.

durationMinutes.description: The estimated duration of the service in minutes.

availableBarberIds.description: References to Barbers who offer this service. (Relationship: Barber N:N Service)

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the service record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the service record was last updated.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents a scheduled booking for a client with a specific barber for a particular service at a given time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Appointment entity.

clientId.description: Reference to Client who booked the appointment.

barberId.description: Reference to Barber providing the service.

serviceId.description: Reference to Service being performed during the appointment.

startTime.description: The scheduled start date and time of the appointment.

endTime.description: The scheduled end date and time of the appointment.

status.description: The current status of the appointment (e.g., 'booked', 'confirmed', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'no-show').

notes.description: Any specific notes or requests related to this particular appointment.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the appointment record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the appointment record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores scheduled appointments/bookings. Renamed from appointments to match app logic.
